title: Behavior Profile Adaptation

story.iWant: to read the rolled-up behavior_profile:* CallerAttribute rows written by BEH-AGG-001 and adjust the per-caller CallerTarget for selected BEH-* parameters
story.soThat: the adaptive loop closes for the BEH-* family: AGGREGATE writes per-caller behaviour fingerprints, and the next call's compose-time CallerTarget reflects those fingerprints — the tutor's targets drift toward what works for this learner without operator intervention

context.applies: Every call - reads BEH-AGG-001 CallerAttribute rows (scope=BEH-AGG-001) and writes CallerTarget upserts for Phase 1 companion / supervision / engagement buckets
assumptions: BEH-AGG-001 has written behavior_profile:{group}:{dimension} CallerAttributes for the caller. If the row is missing (minimumObservations not yet met), the rule's evaluateCondition(null) returns false and the rule silently skips — natural activation gating without a profileCondition.
CallerTarget.targetValue is the canonical write surface for ADAPT outputs — the per-caller cascade layer that wins over BehaviorTarget(scope=*).

Phase 1 (#2076) shipped 3 buckets — companion / supervision / engagement. Phase 2 (#2077, this rev) extends to personality / curriculum / learning / reinforcement / onboarding. The two phases together cover 8 of 9 BEH-AGG-001 output groups. behavior-core (BEH-WARMTH / BEH-FORMALITY / BEH-DIRECTNESS / BEH-TONE / BEH-RESPONSE-LEN / BEH-TURN-LENGTH) is intentionally NOT written by ADAPT — those are operator-set via the System→Domain→Course→Caller cascade.

Phase 2 deliberately disjoint-targets where sibling ADAPT specs already write: ADAPT-PERS-001 keeps BEH-DIRECTNESS / BEH-FORMALITY / BEH-PAUSE-TOLERANCE / BEH-RESPONSE-LEN / BEH-EMPATHY-RATE / BEH-PROACTIVE; ADAPT-CURR-001 keeps the 20 *-instructional BEH-* targets it already drives; ADAPT-LEARN-001 + ADAPT-VARK-001 keep their modality / scaffolding sets; ADAPT-ENG-001 keeps engagement-targets-manifest's onboarding triple (context_setting / goal_discovery / preference_elicitation). ADAPT-BEH-001 Phase 2 targets only the orphan *-ADAPTATION rows in each bucket plus a small number of cross-bucket nudges (BEH-WARMTH / BEH-CHECK-FOR-UNDERSTANDING / BEH-CHALLENGE-LEVEL / BEH-ENGAGEMENT) on reinforcement-trend triggers.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Companion bucket — engagement-level adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: If engagement_level is 'low', CallerTarget(BEH-ENGAGEMENT).targetValue is increased by 0.10

acceptanceCriteria.title: Companion bucket — question-rate adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.given: BEH-AGG-001 wrote behavior_profile:companion:question_rate for the caller
acceptanceCriteria.then: If question_rate is 'rare', CallerTarget(BEH-QUESTION-RATE).targetValue is increased by 0.10

acceptanceCriteria.title: Supervision bucket — tutor-fidelity adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: If tutor_fidelity is 'low', CallerTarget(BEH-DEFINITION-PRECISION).targetValue is increased by 0.10

acceptanceCriteria.title: Supervision bucket — style-consistency adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: If style_consistency is 'inconsistent', CallerTarget(BEH-FORMALITY).targetValue is set to 0.6

acceptanceCriteria.title: Supervision bucket — target-alignment adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: If target_alignment is 'misaligned', CallerTarget(BEH-DIRECTNESS).targetValue is increased by 0.05

acceptanceCriteria.title: Supervision bucket — safety-compliance adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: If safety_compliance is 'marginal', CallerTarget(BEH-WARMTH).targetValue is decreased by 0.05

acceptanceCriteria.title: Engagement bucket — cognitive-activation adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: If cognitive_activation is 'low', CallerTarget(BEH-INTELLECTUAL-CHALLENGE).targetValue is increased by 0.10; if 'high', decreased by 0.05

acceptanceCriteria.title: Engagement bucket — call-frequency-fidelity adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: If call_frequency_fidelity is 'drift', CallerTarget(BEH-ENGAGEMENT).targetValue is set to 0.8

acceptanceCriteria.title: Personality bucket — Big-Five OCEAN targets
acceptanceCriteria.given: PERS-001 wrote parameterValues for B5-O / B5-C / B5-E / B5-A / B5-N
acceptanceCriteria.then: For each OCEAN axis above/below threshold (0.65 / 0.35), CallerTarget(BEH-{O,C,E,A,N}-ADAPTATION).targetValue is set to 0.8 / 0.3 respectively

acceptanceCriteria.title: Curriculum bucket — mastery-fidelity adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: For each of {application, comprehension, concept-exposure, mastery, module-introduction, prerequisite, review} fidelities reading 'low', the matching BEH-*-ADAPTATION CallerTarget.targetValue is increased by 0.10; reading 'high' decreases by 0.05

acceptanceCriteria.title: Learning bucket — modality and pace adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: Multimodal-fidelity 'low' raises visual_adaptation / auditory_adaptation / kinesthetic_adaptation by 0.10. Reading-writing fidelity 'low' raises BEH-EXPLANATION-DEPTH by 0.10. Question-frequency-fidelity 'low' raises BEH-SOCRATIC-QUESTIONING by 0.10. Feedback-style fidelity 'low' raises adapt_to_pace_preference and adapt_to_learning_style by 0.10. Interaction-style fidelity 'low' shifts BEH-ABSTRACT-VS-CONCRETE down by 0.05.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Reinforcement bucket — reward-trend adaptation
acceptanceCriteria.then: When a reward trend reads 'low' the matching CallerTarget is bumped: composite_reward → BEH-ERROR-ELABORATION +0.10; engagement_reward → BEH-ENGAGEMENT set to 0.8; goal_progress_reward → BEH-CHALLENGE-LEVEL +0.05; learning_reward → BEH-CHECK-FOR-UNDERSTANDING +0.10; rapport_reward → BEH-WARMTH +0.05.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Onboarding bucket — operator-quality compensation
acceptanceCriteria.then: default_targets_quality 'low' raises BEH-CHECK-FOR-UNDERSTANDING by 0.10. welcome_quality 'low' raises BEH-WARMTH by 0.05. Other onboarding keys (context_setting_quality / goal_discovery_quality / preference_elicitation_quality) are consumed by ADAPT-ENG-001 via engagement-targets-manifest — not duplicated here.

parameters.name: Companion Engagement Adaptation
parameters.description: Raise BEH-ENGAGEMENT target when the caller's rolled-up companion:engagement_level fingerprint reads 'low'.

actions.rationale: Companion fingerprint shows low engagement — raise the engagement target so the tutor leans in more.

parameters.name: Companion Question-Rate Adaptation
parameters.description: Raise BEH-QUESTION-RATE target when the caller's rolled-up companion:question_rate fingerprint reads 'rare'.

actions.rationale: Tutor consistently underdelivers on questions — raise the target so it asks more.

parameters.name: Supervision Tutor-Fidelity Adaptation
parameters.description: Tighten BEH-DEFINITION-PRECISION when tutor_fidelity drifts low — sharper definitions reduce ambiguity that the supervision signal flagged.

actions.rationale: Supervision flagged low tutor fidelity — raise definition precision so the prompt directive is sharper.

parameters.name: Supervision Style-Consistency Adaptation
parameters.description: Anchor BEH-FORMALITY at a midpoint when style_consistency reads 'inconsistent' — fixes the drift by pinning the target.

actions.rationale: Inconsistent style — pin formality to a balanced midpoint so subsequent calls have a stable anchor.

parameters.name: Supervision Target-Alignment Adaptation
parameters.description: Raise BEH-DIRECTNESS when target_alignment is 'misaligned' — more direct prompts reduce miss rate.

actions.rationale: Supervision flagged misaligned targets — small directness bump helps the tutor steer back on track.

parameters.name: Supervision Safety-Compliance Adaptation
parameters.description: Lower BEH-WARMTH when safety_compliance is 'marginal' — tighter warmth makes the tutor less likely to over-agree with unsafe content.

actions.rationale: Marginal safety compliance — small warmth reduction tightens the tutor's empathy gating so it pushes back on unsafe content.

parameters.name: Engagement Cognitive-Activation Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-INTELLECTUAL-CHALLENGE in both directions based on the rolled-up cognitive_activation fingerprint.

actions.rationale: Low cognitive activation — raise challenge so the tutor pushes more.
High cognitive activation — small reduction so the tutor doesn't overshoot.

parameters.name: Engagement Call-Frequency-Fidelity Adaptation
parameters.description: Pin BEH-ENGAGEMENT high when call_frequency_fidelity is 'drift' — the caller is missing their cadence; raising engagement increases the chance the next call lands.

actions.rationale: Call cadence drifting — pin engagement high so the next session is more memorable / sticky.

parameters.name: Personality Openness Adaptation
parameters.description: Drive BEH-OPENNESS-ADAPTATION target from the Big-Five openness measure on CallerPersonalityProfile.

actions.rationale: High openness — favour exploratory style.
Low openness — favour practical style.

parameters.name: Personality Conscientiousness Adaptation
parameters.description: Drive BEH-CONSCIENTIOUSNESS-ADAPTATION target from the Big-Five conscientiousness measure.

actions.rationale: High conscientiousness — favour structured detailed delivery.
Low conscientiousness — favour flexible overview delivery.

parameters.name: Personality Extraversion Adaptation
parameters.description: Drive BEH-EXTRAVERSION-ADAPTATION target from the Big-Five extraversion measure.

actions.rationale: High extraversion — favour energetic back-and-forth dialogue.
Low extraversion — favour measured pace and pauses.

parameters.name: Personality Agreeableness Adaptation
parameters.description: Drive BEH-AGREEABLENESS-ADAPTATION target from the Big-Five agreeableness measure.

actions.rationale: High agreeableness — favour warm cooperative style.
Low agreeableness — favour direct honest style.

parameters.name: Personality Neuroticism Adaptation
parameters.description: Drive BEH-NEUROTICISM-ADAPTATION target from the Big-Five neuroticism measure.

actions.rationale: High neuroticism — favour reassuring calm style.
Low neuroticism — favour straightforward style.

parameters.name: Curriculum Application Fidelity Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-APPLICATION-ADAPTATION target when behavior_profile:curriculum:application_fidelity reads 'low' / 'high'.

actions.rationale: application fidelity drifting low — raise application-vs-explanation target.
application fidelity reads high — small reduction to avoid overshoot.

parameters.name: Curriculum Comprehension Fidelity Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-COMPREHENSION-ADAPTATION target when behavior_profile:curriculum:comprehension_fidelity reads 'low' / 'high'.

actions.rationale: comprehension fidelity drifting low — raise comprehension-based scaffolding target.
comprehension fidelity reads high — small reduction to avoid overshoot.

parameters.name: Curriculum Concept Exposure Depth Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-CONCEPT-EXPOSURE target when behavior_profile:curriculum:concept_exposure_depth reads 'low' / 'high'.

actions.rationale: concept exposure depth shallow — raise depth target.
concept exposure depth reads high — small reduction to avoid overshoot.

parameters.name: Curriculum Mastery Fidelity Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-MASTERY-ADAPTATION target when behavior_profile:curriculum:mastery_fidelity reads 'low' / 'high'.

actions.rationale: mastery fidelity drifting low — raise mastery-based teaching target.
mastery fidelity reads high — small reduction to avoid overshoot.

parameters.name: Curriculum Module Introduction Status Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-MODULE-INTRODUCTION target when behavior_profile:curriculum:module_introduction_status reads 'low' / 'high'.

actions.rationale: module introduction status incomplete — raise introduction target.
module introduction status reads high — small reduction to avoid overshoot.

parameters.name: Curriculum Prerequisite Fidelity Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-PREREQUISITE-ADAPTATION target when behavior_profile:curriculum:prerequisite_fidelity reads 'low' / 'high'.

actions.rationale: prerequisite fidelity drifting low — raise foundation reinforcement target.
prerequisite fidelity reads high — small reduction to avoid overshoot.

parameters.name: Curriculum Review Fidelity Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-REVIEW-ADAPTATION target when behavior_profile:curriculum:review_fidelity reads 'low' / 'high'.

actions.rationale: review fidelity drifting low — raise review priority target.
review fidelity reads high — small reduction to avoid overshoot.

parameters.name: Learning Visual Modality Adaptation
parameters.description: Raise visual_adaptation target when multimodal fidelity drifts low (caller benefits from richer visual scaffolds).

actions.rationale: Multimodal fidelity low — boost visual scaffolds.

parameters.name: Learning Auditory Modality Adaptation
parameters.description: Raise auditory_adaptation target when multimodal fidelity drifts low.

actions.rationale: Multimodal fidelity low — boost auditory cues.

parameters.name: Learning Kinesthetic Modality Adaptation
parameters.description: Raise kinesthetic_adaptation target when multimodal fidelity drifts low.

actions.rationale: Multimodal fidelity low — boost kinesthetic prompts.

parameters.name: Learning Explanation Depth Adaptation
parameters.description: Raise BEH-EXPLANATION-DEPTH when reading/writing fidelity reads 'low' — the caller needs deeper textual explanations.

actions.rationale: Reading/writing fidelity low — deepen textual explanations.
Reading/writing fidelity high — small reduction to avoid over-elaboration.

parameters.name: Learning Abstract-vs-Concrete Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust BEH-ABSTRACT-VS-CONCRETE based on interaction-style fidelity — drift toward concrete when the caller's interaction style is hard to match.

actions.rationale: Interaction style fidelity low — shift toward more concrete framing.

parameters.name: Learning Socratic Questioning Adaptation
parameters.description: Raise BEH-SOCRATIC-QUESTIONING when question-frequency fidelity drifts low — the tutor isn't drawing the caller out enough.

actions.rationale: Question frequency fidelity low — invite more Socratic dialogue.

parameters.name: Learning Pace Preference Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust adapt_to_pace_preference when feedback-style fidelity reads 'low' — the caller is signalling a pace mismatch.

actions.rationale: Feedback style fidelity low — re-tune to caller's pace.

parameters.name: Learning Style Preference Adaptation
parameters.description: Adjust adapt_to_learning_style when feedback-style fidelity drifts low.

actions.rationale: Feedback style fidelity low — re-tune learning-style adaptation.

parameters.name: Reinforcement Composite Reward Adaptation
parameters.description: When the composite reward trend reads 'low', raise BEH-ERROR-ELABORATION so the tutor reflects on mistakes more deliberately.

actions.rationale: Composite reward trending low — elaborate on errors to lift learning gain.

parameters.name: Reinforcement Engagement Reward Adaptation
parameters.description: When the engagement reward trend reads 'low', pin BEH-ENGAGEMENT high to recover engagement signal.

actions.rationale: Engagement reward trending low — pin engagement high to re-engage the caller.

parameters.name: Reinforcement Goal-Progress Reward Adaptation
parameters.description: When goal-progress reward trends low, raise BEH-CHALLENGE-LEVEL so the tutor pushes toward measurable gain.

actions.rationale: Goal-progress reward trending low — small challenge bump to recover progress signal.

parameters.name: Reinforcement Learning Reward Adaptation
parameters.description: When learning reward trends low, raise BEH-CHECK-FOR-UNDERSTANDING so the tutor verifies grasp more often.

actions.rationale: Learning reward trending low — check for understanding more often.

parameters.name: Reinforcement Rapport Reward Adaptation
parameters.description: When rapport reward trends low, raise BEH-WARMTH to rebuild rapport.

actions.rationale: Rapport reward trending low — small warmth bump to rebuild rapport.

parameters.name: Onboarding Default-Targets Quality Adaptation
parameters.description: When BEH-AGG-001 reads behavior_profile:onboarding:default_targets_quality 'low' (operator picked weak defaults), raise BEH-CHECK-FOR-UNDERSTANDING to compensate with more frequent comprehension checks on early calls.

actions.rationale: Default targets weak — compensate with more frequent comprehension checks.

parameters.name: Onboarding Welcome Quality Adaptation
parameters.description: When behavior_profile:onboarding:welcome_quality reads 'low' (the welcome experience under-served the caller), raise BEH-WARMTH to recover affective alignment in subsequent calls.

actions.rationale: Welcome quality low — small warmth bump to recover affective alignment.

constraints.description: Requires BEH-AGG-001 to have written behavior_profile:* CallerAttributes before computing adaptations. When the row is missing, evaluateCondition(null) returns false and the rule silently skips — natural activation gating.

ADAPT-BEH-001 and ADAPT-PERS-001 BOTH write CallerTarget upserts. Phase 1 avoids targeting parameters owned by ADAPT-PERS-001 (BEH-EMPATHY-RATE / BEH-PROACTIVE) per Q2/Option-C — last write wins is unimportant when the sets are disjoint. Phase 2 should consider an outputPriority coordination layer if the sets overlap.

Phase 2 personality rules read PERS-001 parameterValues (B5-O/C/E/A/N) while ADAPT-PERS-001 also reads them; the two specs target disjoint parameter sets (Phase 2 → 5 *-ADAPTATION; PERS-001 → BEH-DIRECTNESS / BEH-FORMALITY / etc.) so last-write-wins ordering is safe.

Phase 2 reinforcement rules adjust cross-bucket targets (BEH-WARMTH / BEH-ENGAGEMENT / BEH-CHALLENGE-LEVEL / BEH-CHECK-FOR-UNDERSTANDING) that other Phase-2 / sibling-ADAPT branches may also touch. The deltas are small (≤ 0.10) and overlap is tolerable; tighten with an outputPriority layer if measurement evidence indicates fighting.

behavior-core bucket (6 params: BEH-WARMTH / BEH-FORMALITY / BEH-DIRECTNESS / BEH-TONE / BEH-RESPONSE-LEN / BEH-TURN-LENGTH) is intentionally NOT adapted. Those values are operator-set via the System→Domain→Course→Caller cascade. See behaviorCoreNote.

related.title: Behavior Parameter Aggregation
related.relationship: provides input — ADAPT-BEH-001 reads BEH-AGG-001 outputs

related.title: Big Five Personality Adaptation
related.relationship: sibling ADAPT spec — owns BEH-EMPATHY-RATE / BEH-PROACTIVE; ADAPT-BEH-001 deliberately avoids these targets

related.title: Curriculum Adaptation
related.relationship: sibling ADAPT spec — owns the 20 instructional BEH-* targets (BEH-ADVANCE-READINESS etc.); ADAPT-BEH-001 Phase 2 writes only the orphan curriculum *-ADAPTATION targets that ADAPT-CURR-001 does not.

related.title: Learner Profile Adaptation
related.relationship: sibling ADAPT spec — owns BEH-ADAPT-TO-* and modality consistency targets; ADAPT-BEH-001 Phase 2 learning wires only the orphan modality + pace + explanation-depth targets.

related.title: Engagement Adaptation
related.relationship: sibling ADAPT spec — consumes 3 of the 5 behavior_profile:onboarding:* keys via engagement-targets-manifest; ADAPT-BEH-001 Phase 2 onboarding wires only the remaining 2 keys.

related.title: VARK Modality Adaptation
related.relationship: sibling ADAPT spec — owns the modality language targets (BEH-DIAGRAM-LANGUAGE etc.); ADAPT-BEH-001 Phase 2 learning wires only the orphan modality-adaptation targets.

notes: Phase 2 (#2077) = + 5 buckets (personality / curriculum / learning / reinforcement / onboarding) = 8 of 9 buckets wired.
Bucket 9 (behavior-core: BEH-WARMTH / BEH-FORMALITY / BEH-DIRECTNESS / BEH-TONE / BEH-RESPONSE-LEN / BEH-TURN-LENGTH) is operator-cascade-set; ADAPT does NOT write here. Listed for inventory.

Personality bucket uses dataSource:"parameterValues" reading PERS-001 outputs (B5-O / B5-C / B5-E / B5-A / B5-N) — distinct from ADAPT-PERS-001 which writes BEH-DIRECTNESS / BEH-FORMALITY / etc. Phase 2 personality writes the orphan *-ADAPTATION targets that ADAPT-PERS-001 doesn't.

Curriculum / learning / reinforcement / onboarding buckets use dataSource:"callerAttribute" with scope=BEH-AGG-001 reading the rolled-up behavior_profile:{group}:* categorical fingerprints (low / moderate / high).

All Phase 2 rules: last-write-wins ordering is acceptable because the targeted sets are disjoint from sibling ADAPT specs (see context.assumptions[3]). If Phase 3 introduces an overlap, add an outputPriority coordination layer.

Onboarding overlap: behavior_profile:onboarding:{context_setting_quality, goal_discovery_quality, preference_elicitation_quality} are already consumed by ADAPT-ENG-001 via engagement-targets-manifest.ts — Phase 2 ADAPT-BEH-001 onboarding wires only the remaining 2 keys (default_targets_quality, welcome_quality).
behaviorCoreNote: behavior-core (BEH-WARMTH / BEH-FORMALITY / BEH-DIRECTNESS / BEH-TONE / BEH-RESPONSE-LEN / BEH-TURN-LENGTH) is operator-set via the System→Domain→Course→Caller cascade. ADAPT-BEH-001 does NOT write here. Listed for inventory; cascade-managed, not adapt-driven.
